title: Contact Cleanup
instruction: Clean up Contacts. Delete any contacts that have not been in touch for more than 30 days. Then find the most recent email thread with the subject 'March planning follow-up' and add Theo Garcia using the email address from that thread, with the note 'Added after March planning thread.'. Do not remove Maya Singh.
eval_check_descriptions: Missing contact was added with the required note

emails.subject: March planning follow-up
emails.body:
Good talking during the March planning thread. Could you add this address to the vendor planning loop going forward?

I usually send contract redlines from here, so it would help to have it saved instead of relying on the older alias.

Thanks,
Theo

emails.subject: Revised budget worksheet
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Miles

emails.subject: Weekly checkpoint
emails.body:
Sending the weekly checkpoint and revised venue shortlist from today's ops review.

The timeline still looks fine on my side, but I wanted to keep the thread warm before next week's decision meeting.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Notes from the partner sync
emails.body:
Sending a quick status update from today's working session.

The team is aligned on the main path and only needs confirmation on the follow-up items. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Miles

emails.subject: Updated rollout checklist
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: Notes from the partner sync
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. Let me know if you want the spreadsheet version as well.

Thanks,
Miles

You can ignore this one once the March thread is wrapped.

Thanks,
Theo
